name: Nicolásek
description: Nicolas: straight light-blond hair, bright blue eyes, white T-shirt with two red horizontal stripes, mid-blue denim shorts, white sneakers with grey soles, tall boy

name: Valentýnka
description: Valentýna: wavy light-blonde hair with large pink fabric bow, sky-blue eyes, yellow dress with small white flower print and white collar, white sandals, very small — roughly half Nicolas's height

name: Táta Jan
description: Jan: short dark-brown hair, warm brown eyes, light-grey T-shirt, dark navy jeans, tall adult man with a short dark beard stubble, broad friendly smile

name: Máma Jana
description: Jana: shoulder-length dark-brown hair, warm brown eyes, white blouse, light beige trousers, medium height adult woman, kind warm smile
